title: Ethirmarai
overview: A detective is investigating a murder series, and he is torn between the case and family problems. Being a tough, intelligent officer, he sets out on a mission to find the serial killer responsible for the murders. The method used by the suspect is inspired by mind control and hypno-programming. Suspects are unable to consciously control their thoughts and actions at the time the crimes were being committed.
